query: SELECT c.id, c.filename, c.status, c.pageCount, COUNT(s.id) as slideCount FROM conversions c LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.conversionId = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45rJ6nqrUEC5QpR.root --database QHrBPxaNj5NoN2a6vhJ4pp --execute SELECT c.id, c.filename, c.status, c.pageCount, COUNT(s.id) as slideCount FROM conversions c LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.conversionId = c.id GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.id DESC LIMIT 5;
